extortion.description: The history of Lambertz is impressive, exciting and rich - Lambertz manages to make the leap from a small bakery in Aachen to one of the oldest confectionery manufacturers in Germany. In 2021, the traditional and family-owned company celebrated its 333rd anniversary.SITE: www.lambertz.de Address : Henry Lambertz GmbH & Co. KG: Borchersstrasse 18 D-52072 Aachen Tel# +49 (0)241 / 89 05-0ALL DATA SIZE: ≈800gb+ 1. Employee Personnel data… 2. Firm data: FiBu, Human Resources… 3. Confidential data… & etc…
